title: ficus mathewsii
intro: Ficus mathewsii, also known as the Mathews fig, is a species of fig tree native to Australia. The leaves and roots of the Ficus mathewsii plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Ficus mathewsii are said to have various health benefits, including relieving fever, reducing swelling, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Ficus mathewsii can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for treating various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal plant.
